Community similarity

Source: R/community.R
community_similarity.Rd

Pairwise similarity among plot embeddings, or of each plot to a reference set.

Usage

community_similarity(x, reference = NULL, metric = c("cosine", "euclidean"))

Arguments

x

A specvec_community.

reference

Optional specvec_community or matrix to compare against; if NULL, compares the object's plots to themselves.

metric

"cosine" (default) returns a similarity matrix; "euclidean" returns a distance matrix.

Value

A matrix of x rows by reference rows.

On this page
